title: Business Accounts (Verified Business Profiles with Greeting & Away Messages)
description: A tiered account type for businesses: verified badge, extended bio, business hours, location, website, greeting message (sent automatically on first contact), and away message (sent when outside business hours). Powered by a configurable automation layer, not bots — no Turing test required.

account_types.business: Self-serve upgrade. No verification badge by default.
account_types.verified_business: Requires human review + document submission. Gets blue checkmark.

schema.business_hours: JSONB (7-element array, per-day open/close times in UTC)

business_profiles.rls: SELECT open (public profile). INSERT/UPDATE restricted to owner user_id.

greeting_message_automation.trigger: First DM from a user who has never messaged this business before (first_contact = no row in user_business_contacts table).
server_flow: 1. Message received from user_id to business user_id.
2. Query user_business_contacts: SELECT 1 WHERE user_id=X AND business_id=Y.
3. If no row → greeting_message_enabled=true → enqueue greeting send job.
5. Greeting sent as system-automated message, attributed to business (not a bot user).
greeting_message_automation.idempotency: user_business_contacts has UNIQUE constraint on (user_id, business_id) — prevents duplicate greetings under concurrent first messages (race condition resolved via INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING).

away_message_automation.trigger: Inbound message arrives outside current business_hours window.
server_evaluation: Compute is_open = current UTC time falls within today's business_hours window adjusted for timezone.
If not is_open AND away_message_enabled → send away message.
Cooldown: send away message at most once per 8h per user to avoid spamming.

quick_replies.description: Business owner pre-defines shortcuts (e.g., '/hours' → 'We are open Mon-Fri 9am-6pm'). When typing in composer, matching shortcuts expand automatically.
quick_replies.scope: Only visible to business account owner in their composer — not exposed to customers.

steps: User submits business registration document via secure upload.
Document stored encrypted (AES-256), accessible only to trust_safety_role.
Manual review by Trust & Safety team within 5 business days.
On approval: SET verified_at = now(), emit verification badge event.
On rejection: notification with reason code.

security.impersonation: Verified badge requires human review — prevents trivial impersonation of brands.
security.message_injection: Greeting/away message text HTML-escaped and length-limited — no script injection.
security.location_privacy: lat/lon only returned to users who follow/contact the business, not publicly indexed.

ui.business_profile_page: Extended profile card: name, category, hours, 'Open now' badge, website, location map, 'Message' CTA.
ui.admin_settings: Settings → Business → toggle greeting/away, edit text, set hours, quick replies manager.
ui.verified_badge: Checkmark icon in chat list and profile header.
